effective_date.description: Effective date of the underlying entity conversion (Maine corp → foreign unincorporated entity) that this charter-surrender filing memorializes. Populated on the surrender filing as a backward-looking recital of when the conversion took effect; distinct from conversion.future_effective_date (forward-looking effective date for MBCA-21's conversion articles).

surviving_entity_jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction (state or country) under whose laws the surviving entity is organized post-conversion. Free-text. MBCA-21B-specific because the surrender filing must identify where to send process under §956.

surviving_entity_executive_office_addres.description: Address of the executive office of the surviving entity immediately after the conversion. Required only if the surviving entity is a nonfiling entity (no SOS-equivalent record exists in its home jurisdiction).

service_of_process_mailing_address.description: Mailing address at which the Maine Secretary of State will mail copies of any process served on the SOS regarding shareholder appraisal-rights actions arising from the conversion (per 13-C MRSA §956.1.E and chapter 13). Always required on MBCA-21B because the surviving entity is foreign by definition. Conceptually parallel to merger.foreign_survivor.service_of_process_mailing_address on MBCA-10.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
